sn4.4:1.1: Thus have I heard. On one occasion the Blessed One was dwelling at Baraṇasi in the Deer Park at Isipatana. There the Blessed One addressed the bhikkhus thus: "Bhikkhus!"
sn4.4:1.2: "Venerable sir!" those bhikkhus replied. The Blessed One said this:
sn4.4:2.1: "Bhikkhus, by careful attention, by careful right striving, I have arrived at unsurpassed liberation, I have realized unsurpassed liberation. You too, bhikkhus, by careful attention, by careful right striving, must arrive at unsurpassed liberation, must realize unsurpassed liberation."
sn4.4:2.2: Then Māra the Evil One approached the Blessed One and addressed him in verse:
sn4.4:5.1: Then Māra the Evil One … disappeared right there.
